content: Phase C1 - Backend: Performance analytics endpoints
Phase D1+D2+D3 - Supervisor Dashboard (Overview / My Tasks / My Performance) with station filter, dept badge, health pie
Phase D4 - Single-asset inspect deep link (?asset_id= on /inspection page) — currently only navigates, not pre-selecting
Phase E - Approving Supervisor Dashboard (asset buttons, station/dept filters, station-health pie + drill-down, My Supervisors, My Tasks approval queue)
Phase F - Reporting Officer Dashboard (ASUP-style scoped to dept + assigned stations)
Phase G - Superadmin Dashboard redesign (asset categories, ROs/ASUPs/Stations/Divisions buttons with drill-downs)
